title: Gift Card Acceptance
description: Where can I use my multi‑brand gift cards (e.g., UpCadhoc, Illicado, CADO, Galeries Lafayette) both online and in physical stores?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive list of merchants and locations that accept the specified gift cards, including both brick‑and‑mortar outlets and e‑commerce sites. Relevant information must identify the retailer name, address or website, category (e.g., fashion, beauty, gastronomy), and any usage restrictions (e.g., exclusions, expiration, maximum spend). Documents that provide maps, partner networks, or explicit acceptance statements for each card are considered relevant.

title: Mild Lamb Tajine
description: What is a lamb tagine recipe for four servings that uses reduced vegetables and mild spice levels?
narrative: The user is looking for a lamb tajine recipe that yields roughly four portions and explicitly calls for fewer vegetables (e.g., half the usual amount of zucchini and eggplant) and a toned‑down spice profile (reduced chili, cumin, and other strong spices). Relevant documents must provide clear ingredient quantities, serving size approximating four people, and cooking instructions that match these constraints.

title: Used Lotus Elise
description: What used Lotus Elise models are currently advertised for sale in France with mileage under 50,000 km, a price below €35,000, and a model year between 2000 and 2005?
narrative: The user is interested in purchasing a pre‑owned Lotus Elise. Relevant documents must list individual car ads that match all of the following criteria: the vehicle is a Lotus Elise, the listed price does not exceed €35,000, the odometer reading is ≤ 50,000 km, and the model year falls within 2000‑2005. Ads lacking any of these attributes, or describing different makes/models, are not relevant.

title: Vegan Paupiette Recipe
description: How can I prepare a vegan version of veal paupiettes that mimics the texture and sauce of the traditional dish?
narrative: The user is looking for plant‑based recipes or detailed substitution guides that replace veal with vegetarian or vegan ingredients while preserving the characteristic shape, stuffing, and flavor profile of classic veal paupiettes. Relevant documents should describe vegan proteins (e.g., seitan, soy, mushroom, or jackfruit) prepared as rolled “paupiettes,” include comparable sauce components (white wine, broth, herbs, balsamic vinegar, mustard, etc.), and provide step‑by‑step cooking instructions similar to the traditional methods (browning, deglazing, simmering). Sources that merely list meat‑based veal recipes, or that do not address vegan adaptations, are not relevant.

title: Car Sun Protection
description: What are the most effective and legally compliant ways to protect a car’s interior and occupants from UV radiation and heat, including sun visors, rear window shades, and solar‑tinted window films?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of solutions for shielding a vehicle from sunlight. Relevant material should describe the different types of sun visors (roll‑up, rear‑mounted, electrostatic), their dimensions, installation methods (hooks, suction cups, electrostatic film), and benefits such as UV blocking, privacy, and heat reduction. It should also cover solar‑tinted window films, including the legal visible‑light‑transmission (VLT) requirements, available shade levels, installation kits, and performance metrics (percentage of UV blocked, heat insulation, fuel savings). The answer should compare these options in terms of effectiveness, ease of DIY installation, cost, and suitability for protecting children in the back seat, while citing any safety or regulatory considerations mentioned in the documents.

title: Eco Women's Apparel
description: What sustainable, organic‑cotton clothing lines does Petit Bateau offer for women?
narrative: The user is looking for information about Petit Bateau’s environmentally friendly women's clothing, specifically items made from 100% organic cotton or other sustainable fabrics. Relevant documents should describe the women's collection, list product types (e.g., dresses, T‑shirts, sweaters, underwear, swimwear), and explicitly mention organic or eco‑friendly materials, sustainable production practices, or “green” lines. Documents that only discuss baby or men's items, or that mention the brand without referencing organic or sustainable attributes, are not relevant.

title: Renault Employee Price
description: What options are available for non‑employees to purchase a new Renault vehicle at the same discounted price as Renault staff members?
narrative: The user wants to find services or programs that allow a private buyer to obtain a new Renault car at employee‑level discounts, including details on the discount percentages, financing or lease‑with‑purchase terms, eligibility criteria, and any associated conditions such as insurance or warranty. Relevant documents are those that describe Renault personnel sales, third‑party agents offering “collaborator‑price” deals, the discount ranges (up to 42.5%), and the specific leasing/LOA offers and contractual requirements.

title: War School e‑book purchase
description: How can I buy and download an e‑book from the School of War website, including payment methods, file formats, and account requirements?
narrative: The user is looking for a step‑by‑step guide on acquiring a digital publication from the School of War (École de Guerre). Relevant information must describe the available e‑book formats (epub2, mobi, azw3), the three download links provided after purchase, how to create and use an account, accepted payment methods (credit card via Société Générale, bank transfer), security of the transaction, and any post‑purchase actions such as contacting support if a download fails. Documents that mention e‑book delivery, payment processing, account creation, and technical requirements are considered relevant.

title: Right of Option
description: When can a jobseeker qualify for and exercise the right of option to receive a higher unemployment allowance?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive information on the eligibility conditions, required work periods (hours/days), allowance thresholds, and procedural steps for invoking the right of option under Pôle Emploi rules, as well as the consequences of choosing this option versus waiting for existing rights to be exhausted. Relevant documents are those that describe the right of option, its thresholds (e.g., 130 days/910 hours, €20 daily limit or 30 % increase), the application process, and the impact on remaining entitlements.

title: AXA Insurance Login
description: How can I access the AXA insurance client space and differentiate it from the AXA bank portal?
narrative: The user seeks a clear, step‑by‑step guide for logging into the AXA insurance client area, including the correct URL (https://client.axa.fr), authentication requirements, password‑recovery procedures, and security checks, while distinguishing these steps from those required for the separate AXA bank portal (axabanque.fr). Relevant documents must describe the insurance portal’s login process, security recommendations, and how to locate insurance‑related services versus banking services.

title: EV Purchase Incentives
description: What financial aids and subsidies are available for buying a new electric vehicle in France, and how do they change the effective purchase price?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on all government and regional incentives for electric cars in France—green bonus amounts, conversion allowances, retrofit premiums, used‑vehicle bonuses, and registration tax exemptions—including eligibility criteria (income thresholds, vehicle price caps, CO₂ limits) and how each aid reduces the overall cost. Relevant documents must describe these aids, their monetary values, conditions, and any interaction with vehicle price ranges.

title: Bicarbonate Mildew Control
description: What are the effectiveness, application guidelines, and safety considerations of using sodium bicarbonate sprays to prevent or treat downy mildew on tomatoes and potatoes?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on using baking soda (sodium bicarbonate) as a fungicidal treatment for downy mildew affecting tomato and potato crops. Relevant documents should describe the recommended concentration and mixing instructions, evidence of efficacy against downy mildew, any observed limitations, and whether treated produce remains safe to eat or store. Sources that discuss the preparation method, field application tips, impact on plant health, and food safety implications (e.g., residue, taste, USDA canning guidance) are considered relevant.

title: Three Days Darkness
description: What are the origins, content, and context of the "three days of darkness" prophecy as described by Monique Mathieu and related New Age and apocalyptic sources?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information about the specific prophecy of a three‑day period of darkness that appears on the Monique Mathieu website and in associated New Age forums. Relevant documents should describe the prophecy itself, how Monique Mathieu presents it, its connection to the "brothers of light" and other galactic or divine beings, and any links to broader apocalyptic or prophetic traditions (e.g., Padre Pio, Nibiru, Hopi, Maya). Documents that merely mention darkness without referencing the three‑day motif, or that discuss unrelated New Age topics, are not relevant.

title: Watch Spaceballs FR
description: Where can I legally stream or download the French version of La Folle Histoire de l'Espace (Spaceballs) online for free?
narrative: The user is seeking a legitimate online location to watch the French-language version of the 1987 Mel Brooks comedy, preferably without cost. Relevant documents should mention streaming, download, or viewing options for the film in French (VF), include URLs or platform names, describe the availability (free, legal, quality, subtitles), and be directly about La Folle Histoire de l'Espace. Documents that only discuss unrelated movies, general privacy policies, or non‑streaming content are not relevant.

title: Season 5 Criticism
description: Why is Season 5 of Le Bureau des Légendes regarded as weaker than the earlier seasons?
narrative: The user is seeking explanations and evidence for the negative reception of Season 5 of the French spy series Le Bureau des Légendes. Relevant documents should discuss fan complaints (e.g., boredom, missing characters, pacing, plot inconsistencies), critical reviews, ratings, and comparisons with Seasons 1‑4, highlighting specific issues such as the final episode, character arcs, and overall storytelling quality.

title: Prevail Verb
description: What are the definitions, conjugations, etymology, and usage examples of the verb “prevail” in English and French?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive linguistic information about the verb “prevail,” including its grammatical forms (present, past, conditional, subjunctive, etc.), conjugation tables, meanings and nuances in both English and French, etymological origin, synonyms/antonyms, and illustrative literary or historical examples. Relevant documents should contain definition entries, conjugation charts, usage notes, and excerpts that demonstrate how “prevail” is employed in various contexts.

title: Rendez-vous Episodes
description: Which celebrities have been featured on France 2's 'Rendez-vous en terre inconnu' and what remote locations or indigenous peoples did each episode explore?
narrative: Relevant documents must provide episode‑level information for the series, including the name of the celebrity guest, the year or season, the remote destination (country, region, or specific community/tribe), and any notable cultural or geographic details mentioned in the program description. Sources that only discuss the show's format, presenter biographies, or unrelated broadcasting schedules are not relevant.

title: Diarrhea Diet
description: What foods and drinks are recommended during an acute bout of diarrhoea, and does a frozen black‑truffle potato crush meet these recommendations?
narrative: The user seeks dietary guidance for managing acute diarrhoea, looking for foods and beverages that are low in fiber, low in fat, cooked, and easy to digest while avoiding raw vegetables, legumes, dairy, sugary sodas, and other irritants. Additionally, the user wants to evaluate whether a specific frozen product—black truffle potato crush, which contains potatoes, cream, butter, and truffle flavorings—fits these criteria and can be safely consumed during the episode.

title: Paris Event Space
description: What event venues in Paris can be rented for large gatherings, including details on size, capacity, visitor traffic, and contact information?
narrative: The user wants to discover and compare rental options for sizable event spaces in Paris. Relevant information should describe the venue’s total area (e.g., square meters), typical event capacity, number of events hosted, annual visitor numbers, location within Paris, and how to contact or book the space. Documents that provide these specifics, such as the Espace Charenton listing, satisfy the need.

title: Green Supplier Comparison
description: How do Urban Solar Energy, E.Leclerc Energies, Alpiq, and ekWateur differ in their residential green electricity offers, pricing structures, contract flexibility, and renewable‑energy verification?
narrative: The user wants to choose a green electricity supplier for a private home and needs a side‑by‑side comparison of the four providers mentioned in the documents. Relevant documents should discuss each provider’s claim of 100 % renewable electricity, the pricing model (kWh price, subscription fees, dynamic or fixed rates), contract terms (binding vs. non‑binding, length, ability to switch without penalties), additional services (self‑consumption options, battery storage, mobile app for consumption monitoring), and how they certify the renewable origin of the energy (Guaranties of Origin, rooftop photovoltaic integration, etc.). Documents that address any of these aspects are considered relevant.

title: Kia EV6 Pricing
description: What are the current purchase price, available trim levels, and applicable government bonuses for the Kia EV6 in France?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed, up‑to‑date information on the Kia EV6's cost in the French market, including the base price for each trim (e.g., Active, Design+, GT), any optional equipment that influences price, and any government or ecological bonuses that may apply. Relevant documents must provide explicit pricing figures, trim specifications, and bonus details; general marketing copy without concrete numbers is not sufficient.

title: French Gaulish Roots
description: What historical, archaeological, linguistic, or genetic evidence supports or refutes the claim that modern French people are descended from the ancient Gauls?
narrative: The user seeks a scholarly overview that evaluates the validity of the "our ancestors were Gauls" narrative. Relevant documents must discuss the composition of the Gaulish peoples, their tribal structures, the process of Roman conquest and Gallo‑Roman acculturation, subsequent migrations (e.g., Franks, Vikings), and modern interpretations of French ancestry. Sources that provide concrete evidence—such as archaeological findings from the La Tène period, linguistic traces of Celtic languages in France, genetic studies of French populations, and historiographical analysis of 19th‑ and 20th‑century nationalist myths—are considered relevant, whereas purely mythological or nationalist textbook statements without supporting data are not.

title: Faro Car Rental
description: What are the cheapest car‑rental options with free cancellation for a one‑week pick‑up and return at Faro Airport in March 2022?
narrative: The user wants to rent a vehicle at Faro Airport (FAO) for a seven‑day period in March (e.g., 19/03/2022‑26/03/2022). Relevant documents must list rental agencies operating at the airport, daily rates (including any taxes), vehicle categories, and whether free cancellation (up to 24 h before pick‑up) is offered. The answer should include driver‑age constraints (26‑65), features such as air‑conditioning, insurance options, and user ratings where available. Any offer that does not cover the full date range, lacks free‑cancellation terms, or is not based at Faro Airport should be considered non‑relevant.

title: Nantes Rental Comparison
description: What are the differences in services, prices, vehicle options, and opening hours between car‑rental agencies at Nantes Atlantic Airport and Nantes South Train Station?
narrative: The user wants a side‑by‑side overview of the car‑rental providers operating at the Nantes airport (e.g., SIXT) and at the Nantes South train station (e.g., ADA, Europcar). Relevant information includes each agency’s location within the site, opening times, age/license requirements, daily rates for various vehicle categories, additional services (GPS, child seats, one‑way rentals), return procedures, and customer‑service details. Documents that describe these aspects for the airport and station agencies are considered relevant.

title: Resistant Potato Varieties
description: Which potato cultivars are resistant to downy mildew, late blight, and common scab and are suitable for temperate climate cultivation?
narrative: The user is looking for potato varieties that combine resistance to the major diseases mentioned in the documents—downy mildew (mildiou), late blight, and common scab—as well as being appropriate for growth in temperate regions. Relevant documents should list specific cultivars (e.g., Samba, Charlotte, Rose de France, Nicola, etc.) and describe their disease‑resistance traits, climate adaptability, and any agronomic characteristics that make them suitable for a temperate garden or farm. Documents that only discuss general pest control, soil preparation, or unrelated varieties are not relevant.

title: Beaujolais Nouveau Release
description: When is the Beaujolais Nouveau released each year and how can I obtain the latest bottles?
narrative: The user wants authoritative information about the annual release date of Beaujolais Nouveau (the third Thursday of November) together with practical guidance on buying the newest vintage, including where it is sold, typical price range, and any promotional offers. Relevant documents must mention the release schedule, sales channels, pricing, or purchasing instructions for the current year's Beaujolais Nouveau.

title: Boat Shoe Care
description: How do I properly clean and waterproof my leather boat shoes?
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed, step‑by‑step guide on maintaining leather boat shoes, including cleaning methods, recommended products (wax, cream, shampoo, brush), and how to apply a waterproofing treatment. Relevant passages are those that describe the cleaning technique, the type of leather‑specific products to use, and the waterproofing coating process. Documents that only mention product listings, pricing, or unrelated fashion advice are not relevant.

title: Affordable Electric Renault
description: Which Renault electric cars can be bought or leased in France for a total price below €20,000 after applying the ecological bonus?
narrative: The user is looking for Renault‑branded 100 % electric vehicles that are currently offered in France and whose net cost (including any first‑rent payment, lease monthly fee, and the €6,000 ecological bonus where applicable) does not exceed €20,000. Relevant results must list the model name (e.g., Twingo E‑Tech, Zoe‑Tech, Twizy E‑Tech), the advertised price before and after the bonus, and any lease terms (duration, first rent, monthly rate, km allowance). Only electric models are acceptable; hybrid or plug‑in hybrid cars are irrelevant. The answer should also note whether the price includes optional insurance or maintenance packs, and must be drawn from the provided Renault promotional information.

title: Corfu Rental Comparison
description: What are the cheapest car rental options in Corfu that include unlimited mileage and free cancellation?
narrative: The user wants to identify car‑rental agencies in Corfu offering the lowest daily rates while also providing unlimited mileage and free cancellation. Relevant documents should mention specific agencies (e.g., Sixt, Europcar, Rent&Go, AcaRent), their price points or average costs, and explicitly state their mileage and cancellation policies. Any information about vehicle categories, location (airport vs city centre), and additional fees (e.g., credit‑card fees) helps assess suitability.

title: Reunion Car Rental
description: Which car rental agency on Réunion Island offers the most cost‑effective weekly rental in July with unlimited mileage, full‑coverage insurance, and complimentary child‑seat options?
narrative: The user is planning a week‑long vacation on Réunion Island in July and wants to identify the most suitable rental provider. Relevant documents should describe pricing (including pre‑pay discounts), mileage limits, insurance packages (e.g., all‑risk, reduced deductible), and any free extras such as baby‑seats or additional drivers. The answer should compare the agencies mentioned (Budget, My Car Loc, SG Services, ADA) and indicate which meets all the specified criteria, citing any location‑specific pick‑up options (airport, hotel, city centre) that affect convenience.

title: US Brand Discontinuations
description: Which American automobile manufacturers have ceased production and what are the key details of their discontinuation?
narrative: The user is researching historic United States car makers that are no longer in operation. Relevant documents should mention brands that have been discontinued (e.g., Oldsmobile, Pontiac, Saturn, Hummer, Plymouth, Mercury, Eagle) and provide information such as the year they were phased out, the parent company, and any notable reasons for their demise. Documents that simply list active brands without reference to discontinuation are not relevant.

title: Mad Max Compensation
description: How does the portrayal of road accidents in the film *Mad Max* relate to actual road‑accident compensation laws such as France's Badinter Law?
narrative: The user wants a comparison between the cinematic depiction of road accidents, their consequences, and characters' responses in *Mad Max* and the real‑world legal framework for compensating victims of road accidents (e.g., eligibility, calculation methods, and types of damages covered by the Badinter Law). Relevant material must describe the film’s accident scenes and plot points, as well as the legal provisions, compensation scales, and procedural details of road‑accident compensation.

title: Accessible Event Parking
description: What accessible parking options and related services are available for upcoming concerts at the Arkéa Arena in Bordeaux?
narrative: The user is looking for information on parking facilities that accommodate reduced mobility or disability needs for events at the ArkéA Arena, including how to reserve a spot, contact details for assistance, and any associated costs. Relevant documents should mention the arena’s address, its dedicated contact line for accessibility, parking reservation procedures, and the schedule of upcoming concerts.

title: Rural Women Voices
description: Locate archival materials documenting the experiences of women farmers in Indre‑et‑Loire from 1969 to 1976.
narrative: The user wants primary sources that capture the perspectives and daily lives of rural women in the Indre‑et‑Loire region during the late 1960s and early 1970s. Relevant items include letters sent by women farmers to Menie Grégoire, recordings or transcripts of the "International Droits des Femmes" radio program, related finding aids, and any metadata (e.g., reference numbers such as 66J48, dates, collection titles). Documents must be original archival material; secondary analyses, unrelated photographic collections, or modern promotional posts are not relevant.

title: Energy Ombudsman Dispute
description: What are the exact steps, eligibility criteria, and required documents for filing a complaint with the French National Energy Ombudsman?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive, step‑by‑step guide on how to use the National Energy Ombudsman to resolve a dispute with an electricity or gas supplier. Relevant information must describe who can use the service (individuals, SMEs, associations), when to contact the Ombudsman (after contacting the supplier and waiting the prescribed period), how to submit a complaint (online, mail, registered letter), the required documentation, the timeline for mediation and the possible outcomes, and any limits on the types of disputes covered. Documents that detail these procedures, eligibility, contact details, and procedural timelines are considered relevant, while general marketing material or unrelated consumer advice is not.

title: Note‑Taking Tablet
description: Which tablet or 2‑in‑1 device offers the best overall experience for handwritten note‑taking in academic or professional environments?
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed recommendation on a tablet or convertible laptop that excels at taking handwritten notes. Relevant factors include stylus support and pressure sensitivity, screen size and resolution, battery life, operating system (especially compatibility with note‑taking apps), weight and portability, and price/value ratio. The user also wants to see current market options and any promotional bundles (e.g., software discounts) mentioned in the provided documents, such as the Huawei MatePad series, hybrid PC/Tablet guides, and related purchase offers.

title: Silver Photography Timeline
description: What are the major milestones in the development of silver‑based photographic processes, equipment, and related software from its origins to the present?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of the history of silver photography, including early optical concepts, chemical processes (heliography, daguerreotype, calotype, wet/dry collodion, silver gelatin), key camera inventions (camera obscura, Leica, Hasselblad, Polaroid, etc.), notable improvements (flash, color film, instant film), and modern software tools for restoring and processing silver images. Relevant documents should describe these milestones, name inventors, dates, and explain how each advance impacted photographic practice. Only sources that directly discuss silver‑based processes, cameras, or software for silver image restoration are considered relevant.

title: Leek Quiche Recipe
description: I am looking for a complete recipe for a leek and lardon quiche, including ingredients, quantities, preparation steps, cooking time, and any helpful tips.
narrative: The user wants a thorough, step‑by‑step recipe for a leek quiche that uses lardons (or a suitable substitute), specifying ingredient amounts, preparation method, baking temperature and duration, as well as optional variations, serving ideas, or storage advice. Relevant documents are those that provide a full ingredient list, detailed cooking instructions, and practical cooking tips.

title: Multiplayer Car Games
description: What free online car games can I play directly in a web browser that support multiplayer modes?
narrative: The user is looking for a curated list of free car‑driving games that run in a browser without requiring a download and that offer online multiplayer functionality (e.g., racing against others, cooperative stunts, or arena combat). Relevant results should describe the game’s core genre (racing, stunt, combat, etc.), confirm that the game is free and browser‑based, and mention the presence of multiplayer features. Games that are only single‑player, require installation, or are not primarily about cars are not relevant.

title: Mobility Aid Eligibility
description: What are the eligibility conditions and application steps for receiving mobility assistance from Pôle emploi for a job interview that is more than 60 km away?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive information on French Pôle emploi mobility assistance, specifically the criteria that make a jobseeker eligible (registration status, unemployment benefit level, distance, contract type), the types of aid available (travel reimbursement, SNCF travel/reservation vouchers, accommodation and meal allowances), the monetary limits, and the procedural steps (when and how to apply, required documents, deadlines). Relevant documents must describe these eligibility rules, the application process, and details of each assistance scheme.

title: SFR Client Access
description: How can I log into the SFR client area and view or download my invoices?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive, official guidance on accessing the SFR (French telecom provider) client portal, including steps to sign in, recover a forgotten password or username, and navigate to the billing section to view or download invoices. Relevant documents must describe the login procedure, password‑reset workflow, location of the invoice‑viewing interface, and any associated mobile app or web resources. Content that merely mentions SFR services without specific instructions for account access or billing is not relevant.

title: Oil Lamp Evolution
description: What are the major differences between historic oil‑lamp manuals and today’s commercially sold oil lamps regarding design, fuel options, and safety features?
narrative: The user seeks a comparative overview that links the pedagogical, historical descriptions of oil lamps found in old manuals with the specifications, consumer reviews, and safety advice presented in modern product listings and rankings. Relevant documents are those that describe the construction and use of oil lamps in past textbooks, as well as current commercial catalogs, top‑10 product comparisons, and safety guidelines. Documents that provide details on lamp components (glass, wick, fuel type), usage instructions, and safety considerations will be considered relevant; purely promotional text lacking technical or historical context will be less relevant.

title: Affordable Full‑Insurance Car Rental
description: What is the cheapest car rental option in Madeira that includes full‑coverage insurance and no hidden fees?
narrative: The user wants to identify a car‑rental service on the island of Madeira that offers the lowest total cost while providing all‑risk (full) insurance, unlimited mileage, and no additional charges such as deductibles, delivery fees, or surprise extras. Relevant information must detail price per day or per week, insurance coverage terms, and any ancillary fees, allowing the user to compare local and international providers.

title: Sautéed New Potatoes
description: What is a reliable recipe for cooking early (new) potatoes by sautéing, including handling tips for their delicate skins and safety advice for sprouted potatoes?
narrative: The user seeks a step‑by‑step recipe that explains how to sauté (rissolée) new or "shot" potatoes while preserving their thin skin, specifying ingredients, cooking times, and techniques mentioned in the documents. In addition, the user wants guidance on whether sprouted potatoes are safe to eat, how to treat them, and how to store new potatoes to prevent sprouting. Relevant passages must describe the sauté/rissolée method, handling of fragile new potatoes, and the health/toxicity information about sprouted potatoes; unrelated potato recipes or general cooking tips without these specifics are not relevant.

title: Return-to-Work Bonus Eligibility
description: What are the current eligibility criteria, required documentation, and application procedure for the French back‑to‑work (return‑to‑work) bonus for RSA/SSA beneficiaries?
narrative: The user is looking for up‑to‑date information on whether they can claim the French return‑to‑work bonus, how many months of work or hours are needed, which benefit recipients (RSA, SSA, etc.) qualify, the bonus amount, and the steps to file a claim. Relevant documents include official statements on the bonus’s existence, eligibility thresholds, required contracts and pay slips, departmental variations (APRE), and historical changes to the program.
